/usr/bin/c++  -pedantic -Wno-long-long -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wcast-qual -Wformat -Wwrite-strings -Wconversion    CMakeFiles/odri_control_interface_demo_solo12.dir/demos/demo_solo12.cpp.o  -o odri_control_interface_demo_solo12  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zihaoye/devel/workspace/build/odri_control_interface:/home/zihaoye/devel/workspace/install/master_board_sdk/lib: libodri_control_interface.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.6.2 /home/zihaoye/devel/workspace/install/master_board_sdk/lib/libmaster_board_sdk.so -lpthread
